tool.name: odgi extract
tool.description: extract subgraphs or parts of a graph
tool.command: odgi extract --idx '$idx' --out '$output' #if $node_list --node-list '$node_list' #end if #if str($node) --node '$node' #end if #if str($context_steps) --context-steps $context_steps #end if #if str($context_bases) --context-bases $context_bases #end if #if str($path_range) --path-range '$path_range' #end if #if $bed_file --bed-file '$bed_file' #end if #if str($pangenomic_range) --pangenomic-range '$pangenomic_range' #end if #if $paths_to_extract --paths-to-extract '$paths_to_extract' #end if #if $lace_paths --lace-paths '$lace_paths' #end if #if str($max_distance_subpaths) --max-distance-subpaths $max_distance_subpaths #end if #if str($max_merging_iterations) --max-merging-iterations $max_merging_iterations #end if $full_range $inverse @THREADS@

param.label: Node list file
param.help: A file with one node id per line to extract from the input graph.

param.label: Single node ID
param.help: Specify a single node ID from which to begin traversal.

param.label: Context steps
param.help: Number of steps (nodes) away from the initial subgraph to collect (default: 0 disabled).

param.label: Context bases
param.help: Number of bases away from the initial subgraph to collect (default: 0 disabled).

param.label: Path range
param.help: Find nodes in the specified path range. Format: path[:pos1[-pos2]] (0-based coordinates).

param.label: BED file
param.help: Find nodes in the path range(s) specified in the given BED file.

param.label: Pangenomic range
param.help: Find nodes in the specified pangenomic range. Format: pos1-pos2 (0-based coordinates).

param.label: Full range
param.help: Collect all nodes in sorted order between min and max position touched by the given path ranges.

param.label: Paths to extract
param.help: File with one path name per line to keep in the extracted graph.

param.label: Lace paths
param.help: File with one path name per line to fully retain in the extracted graph.

param.label: Maximum distance between subpaths
param.help: Maximum distance between subpaths allowed for merging. Set 0 to disable.

param.label: Maximum merging iterations
param.help: Maximum number of iterations when merging close subpaths (default: 3).

param.label: Inverse extraction
param.help: Extract parts of the graph that do NOT meet the query criteria.

tool.help:
@HELP_HEADER@
`odgi extract` extracts subgraphs or parts of a graph defined by query criteria such as node IDs, path ranges, BED intervals, or pangenomic ranges.
### Inputs
- **Input odgi graph**: The graph to extract from. - **Node list file**: One node ID per line. - **Single node ID**: A single node to start traversal from. - **Context steps / bases**: Expand the extracted subgraph by N steps or bases. - **Path range**: Extract nodes in a path range (format: `path[:pos1[-pos2]]`). - **BED file**: Extract nodes in path ranges from a BED file. - **Pangenomic range**: Extract nodes in a pangenomic coordinate range. - **Paths to extract / Lace paths**: Control which paths are retained.
### Outputs
- **odgi**: The extracted subgraph in ODGI format.
### Notes
- Use **Inverse extraction** to get the complement of the query result. - Use **Full range** to avoid splitting paths at node boundaries. - **Context steps/bases** expand the subgraph around the initial selection.
